header.title: End Times - Last Days
header.description: These are verses about the last days, end times and the day of the Lord

texts.NIV84: Jesus left the temple and was walking away when his disciples came up to him to call his attention to its buildings.
texts.KJV: And Jesus went out, and departed from the temple: and his disciples came to him for to shew him the buildings of the temple.
texts.NASB95: Jesus came out from the temple and was going away when His disciples came up to point out the temple buildings to Him.
texts.NKJV: Then Jesus went out and departed from the temple, and His disciples came up to show Him the buildings of the temple.
texts.DRB: AND Jesus being come out of the temple, went away. And his disciples came to shew him the buildings of the temple.

texts.NIV84: "Do you see all these things?" he asked. "I tell you the truth, not one stone here will be left on another; every one will be thrown down."
texts.KJV: And Jesus said unto them, See ye not all these things? verily I say unto you, There shall not be left here one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
texts.NASB95: And He said to them, “Do you not see all these things? Truly I say to you, not one stone here will be left upon another, which will not be torn down.”
texts.NKJV: And Jesus said to them, “Do you not see all these things? Assuredly, I say to you, not one stone shall be left here upon another, that shall not be thrown down.”
texts.DRB: And he answering, said to them: Do you see all these things? Amen I say to you there shall not be left here a stone upon a stone that shall not be destroyed.

texts.NIV84: As he was leaving the temple, one of his disciples said to him, "Look, Teacher! What massive stones! What magnificent buildings!"
texts.KJV: And as he went out of the temple, one of his disciples saith unto him, Master, see what manner of stones and what buildings are here!
texts.NASB95: As He was going out of the temple, one of His disciples said to Him, “Teacher, behold what wonderful stones and what wonderful buildings!”
texts.NKJV: Then as He went out of the temple, one of His disciples said to Him, “Teacher, see what manner of stones and what buildings are here!”
texts.DRB: AND as he was going out of the temple, one of his disciples said to him: Master, behold what manner of stones and what buildings are here.

texts.NIV84: "Do you see all these great buildings?" replied Jesus. "Not one stone here will be left on another; every one will be thrown down."
texts.KJV: And Jesus answering said unto him, Seest thou these great buildings? there shall not be left one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
texts.NASB95: And Jesus said to him, “Do you see these great buildings? Not one stone will be left upon another which will not be torn down.”
texts.NKJV: And Jesus answered and said to him, “Do you see these great buildings? Not one stone shall be left upon another, that shall not be thrown down.”
texts.DRB: And Jesus answering, said to him: Seest thou all these great buildings? There shall not be left a stone upon a stone, that shall not be thrown down.

texts.NIV84: Some of his disciples were remarking about how the temple was adorned with beautiful stones and with gifts dedicated to God. But Jesus said,
texts.KJV: And as some spake of the temple, how it was adorned with goodly stones and gifts, he said,
texts.NASB95: And while some were talking about the temple, that it was adorned with beautiful stones and votive gifts, He said,
texts.NKJV: Then, as some spoke of the temple, how it was adorned with beautiful stones and donations, He said,
texts.DRB: And some saying of the temple, that it was adorned with goodly stones and gifts, he said:

texts.NIV84: "As for what you see here, the time will come when not one stone will be left on another; every one of them will be thrown down."
texts.KJV: As for these things which ye behold, the days will come, in the which there shall not be left one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
texts.NASB95: “As for these things which you are looking at, the days will come in which there will not be left one stone upon another which will not be torn down.”
texts.NKJV: “These things which you see—the days will come in which not one stone shall be left upon another that shall not be thrown down.”
texts.DRB: These things which you see, the days will come in which there shall not be left a stone upon a stone that shall not be thrown down.

blocks.title: Signs of Times & End of the Age

texts.NIV84: As Jesus was sitting on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to him privately. "Tell us," they said, "when will this happen, and what will be the sign of your coming and of the end of the age?"
texts.KJV: And as he sat upon the mount of Olives, the disciples came unto him privately, saying, Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign of thy coming, and of the end of the world?
texts.NASB95: As He was sitting on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to Him privately, saying, “Tell us, when will these things happen, and what will be the sign of Your coming, and of the end of the age?”
texts.NKJV: Now as He sat on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to Him privately, saying, “Tell us, when will these things be? And what will be the sign of Your coming, and of the end of the age?”
texts.DRB: And when he was sitting on mount Olivet, the disciples came to him privately, saying: Tell us when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign of thy coming, and of the consummation of the world?

texts.NIV84: Jesus answered: "Watch out that no one deceives you.
texts.KJV: And Jesus answered and said unto them, Take heed that no man deceive you.
texts.NASB95: And Jesus answered and said to them, “See to it that no one misleads you.
texts.NKJV: And Jesus answered and said to them: “Take heed that no one deceives you.
texts.DRB: And Jesus answering, said to them: Take heed that no man seduce you:

texts.NIV84: For many will come in my name, claiming, 'I am the Christ, 'and will deceive many.
texts.KJV: For many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and shall deceive many.
texts.NASB95: For many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am the Christ,’ and will mislead many.
texts.NKJV: For many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am the Christ,’ and will deceive many.
texts.DRB: For many will come in my name saying, I am Christ: and they will seduce many.

texts.NIV84: You will hear of wars and rumors of wars, but see to it that you are not alarmed. Such things must happen, but the end is still to come.
texts.KJV: And ye shall hear of wars and rumours of wars: see that ye be not troubled: for all these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet.
texts.NASB95: You will be hearing of wars and rumors of wars. See that you are not frightened, for those things must take place, but that is not yet the end.
texts.NKJV: And you will hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you are not troubled; for all these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet.
texts.DRB: And you shall hear of wars and rumours of wars. See that ye be not troubled. For these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet.

texts.NIV84: Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be famines and earthquakes in various places.
texts.KJV: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: and there shall be famines, and pestilences, and earthquakes, in divers places.
texts.NASB95: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom, and in various places there will be famines and earthquakes.
texts.NKJV: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. And there will be famines, pestilences, and earthquakes in various places.
texts.DRB: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom; and there shall be pestilences, and famines, and earthquakes in places:

texts.NIV84: All these are the beginning of birth pains.
texts.KJV: All these are the beginning of sorrows.
texts.NASB95: But all these things are merely the beginning of birth pangs.
texts.NKJV: All these are the beginning of sorrows.
texts.DRB: Now all these are the beginnings of sorrows.

texts.NIV84: "Then you will be handed over to be persecuted and put to death, and you will be hated by all nations because of me.
texts.KJV: Then shall they deliver you up to be afflicted, and shall kill you: and ye shall be hated of all nations for my name's sake.
texts.NASB95: “Then they will deliver you to tribulation, and will kill you, and you will be hated by all nations because of My name.
texts.NKJV: “Then they will deliver you up to tribulation and kill you, and you will be hated by all nations for My name’s sake.
texts.DRB: Then shall they deliver you up to be afflicted, and shall put you to death: and you shall be hated by all nations for my name's sake.

texts.NIV84: At that time many will turn away from the faith and will betray and hate each other,
texts.KJV: And then shall many be offended, and shall betray one another, and shall hate one another.
texts.NASB95: At that time many will fall away and will betray one another and hate one another.
texts.NKJV: And then many will be offended, will betray one another, and will hate one another.
texts.DRB: And then shall many be scandalized: and shall betray one another: and shall hate one another.

texts.NIV84: and many false prophets will appear and deceive many people.
texts.KJV: And many false prophets shall rise, and shall deceive many.
texts.NASB95: Many false prophets will arise and will mislead many.
texts.NKJV: Then many false prophets will rise up and deceive many.
texts.DRB: And many false prophets shall rise, and shall seduce many.

texts.NIV84: Because of the increase of wickedness, the love of most will grow cold,
texts.KJV: And because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.
texts.NASB95: Because lawlessness is increased, most people’s love will grow cold.
texts.NKJV: And because lawlessness will abound, the love of many will grow cold.
texts.DRB: And because iniquity hath abounded, the charity of many shall grow cold.

texts.NIV84: but he who stands firm to the end will be saved.
texts.KJV: But he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved.
texts.NASB95: But the one who endures to the end, he will be saved.
texts.NKJV: But he who endures to the end shall be saved.
texts.DRB: But he that shall persevere to the end, he shall be saved.

texts.NIV84: And this gospel of the kingdom will be preached in the whole world as a testimony to all nations, and then the end will come.
texts.KJV: And this gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in all the world for a witness unto all nations; and then shall the end come.
texts.NASB95: This gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in the whole world as a testimony to all the nations, and then the end will come.
texts.NKJV: And this gospel of the kingdom will be preached in all the world as a witness to all the nations, and then the end will come.
texts.DRB: And this gospel of the kingdom, shall be preached in the whole world, for a testimony to all nations, and then shall the consummation come.

blocks.title: Signs of Times & End of the Age

texts.NIV84: As Jesus was sitting on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter, James, John and Andrew asked him privately,
texts.KJV: And as he sat upon the mount of Olives over against the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew asked him privately,
texts.NASB95: As He was sitting on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew were questioning Him privately,
texts.NKJV: Now as He sat on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter, James, John, and Andrew asked Him privately,
texts.DRB: And as he sat on the mount of Olivet over against the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew asked him apart:

texts.NIV84: "Tell us, when will these things happen? And what will be the sign that they are all about to be fulfilled?"
texts.KJV: Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign when all these things shall be fulfilled?
texts.NASB95: “Tell us, when will these things be, and what will be the sign when all these things are going to be fulfilled?”
texts.NKJV: “Tell us, when will these things be? And what will be the sign when all these things will be fulfilled?”
texts.DRB: Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign when all these things shall begin to be fulfilled?

texts.NIV84: Jesus said to them: "Watch out that no one deceives you.
texts.KJV: And Jesus answering them began to say, Take heed lest any man deceive you:
texts.NASB95: And Jesus began to say to them, “See to it that no one misleads you.
texts.NKJV: And Jesus, answering them, began to say: “Take heed that no one deceives you.
texts.DRB: And Jesus answering, began to say to them, Take heed lest any man deceive you.

texts.NIV84: Many will come in my name, claiming, 'I am he,' and will deceive many.
texts.KJV: For many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and shall deceive many.
texts.NASB95: Many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am He!’ and will mislead many.
texts.NKJV: For many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am He,’ and will deceive many.
texts.DRB: For many shall come in my name, saying, I am he; and they shall deceive many.

texts.NIV84: When you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be alarmed. Such things must happen, but the end is still to come.
texts.KJV: And when ye shall hear of wars and rumours of wars, be ye not troubled: for such things must needs be; but the end shall not be yet.
texts.NASB95: When you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be frightened; those things must take place; but that is not yet the end.
texts.NKJV: But when you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be troubled; for such things must happen, but the end is not yet.
texts.DRB: And when you shall hear of wars and rumours of wars, fear ye not. For such things must needs be, but the end is not yet.

texts.NIV84: Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in various places, and famines. These are the beginning of birth pains.
texts.KJV: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: and there shall be earthquakes in divers places, and there shall be famines and troubles: these are the beginnings of sorrows.
texts.NASB95: For nation will rise up against nation, and kingdom against kingdom; there will be earthquakes in various places; there will also be famines. These things are merely the beginning of birth pangs.
texts.NKJV: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. And there will be earthquakes in various places, and there will be famines and troubles. These are the beginnings of sorrows.
texts.DRB: For nation shall rise against nation and kingdom against kingdom, and there shall be earthquakes in divers places, and famines. These things are the beginning of sorrows.

texts.NIV84: "You must be on your guard. You will be handed over to the local councils and flogged in the synagogues. On account of me you will stand before governors and kings as witnesses to them.
texts.KJV: But take heed to yourselves: for they shall deliver you up to councils; and in the synagogues ye shall be beaten: and ye shall be brought before rulers and kings for my sake, for a testimony against them.
texts.NASB95: “But be on your guard; for they will deliver you to the courts, and you will be flogged in the synagogues, and you will stand before governors and kings for My sake, as a testimony to them.
texts.NKJV: “But watch out for yourselves, for they will deliver you up to councils, and you will be beaten in the synagogues. You will be brought before rulers and kings for My sake, for a testimony to them.
texts.DRB: But look to yourselves. For they shall deliver you up to councils, and in the synagogues you shall be beaten, and you shall stand before governors and kings for my sake, for a testimony unto them.

texts.NIV84: And the gospel must first be preached to all nations.
texts.KJV: And the gospel must first be published among all nations.
texts.NASB95: The gospel must first be preached to all the nations.
texts.NKJV: And the gospel must first be preached to all the nations.
texts.DRB: And unto all nations the gospel must first be preached.

texts.NIV84: Whenever you are arrested and brought to trial, do not worry beforehand about what to say. Just say whatever is given you at the time, for it is not you speaking, but the Holy Spirit.
texts.KJV: But when they shall lead you, and deliver you up, take no thought beforehand what ye shall speak, neither do ye premeditate: but whatsoever shall be given you in that hour, that speak ye: for it is not ye that speak, but the Holy Ghost.
texts.NASB95: When they arrest you and hand you over, do not worry beforehand about what you are to say, but say whatever is given you in that hour; for it is not you who speak, but it is the Holy Spirit.
texts.NKJV: <span style='color:#952004; font-weight:600'>But when they arrest you and deliver you up, do not worry beforehand, or premeditate what you will speak. But whatever is given you in that hour, speak that; for it is not you who speak, but the Holy Spirit.
texts.DRB: And when they shall lead you and deliver you up, be not thoughtful beforehand what you shall speak; but whatsoever shall be given you in that hour, that speak ye. For it is not you that speak, but the Holy Ghost.

texts.NIV84: "Brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child. Children will rebel against their parents and have them put to death.
texts.KJV: Now the brother shall betray the brother to death, and the father the son; and children shall rise up against their parents, and shall cause them to be put to death.
texts.NASB95: Brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child; and children will rise up against parents and have them put to death.
texts.NKJV: Now brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child; and children will rise up against parents and cause them to be put to death.
texts.DRB: And the brother shall betray his brother unto death, and the father his son; and children shall rise up against the parents, and shall work their death.

texts.NIV84: All men will hate you because of me, but he who stands firm to the end will be saved.
texts.KJV: And ye shall be hated of all men for my name's sake: but he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved.
texts.NASB95: You will be hated by all because of My name, but the one who endures to the end, he will be saved.
texts.NKJV: And you will be hated by all for My name’s sake. But he who endures to the end shall be saved.
texts.DRB: And you shall be hated by all men for my name's sake. But he that shall endure unto the end, he shall be saved.

blocks.title: Signs of Times & End of the Age

texts.NIV84: "Teacher," they asked, "when will these things happen? And what will be the sign that they are about to take place?"
texts.KJV: And they asked him, saying, Master, but when shall these things be? and what sign will there be when these things shall come to pass?
texts.NASB95: They questioned Him, saying, “Teacher, when therefore will these things happen? And what will be the sign when these things are about to take place?”
texts.NKJV: So they asked Him, saying, “Teacher, but when will these things be? And what sign will there be when these things are about to take place?”
texts.DRB: And they asked him, saying: Master, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign when they shall begin to come to pass?

texts.NIV84: He replied: "Watch out that you are not deceived. For many will come in my name, claiming, 'I am he,' and, 'The time is near.' Do not follow them.
texts.KJV: And he said, Take heed that ye be not deceived: for many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and the time draweth near: go ye not therefore after them.
texts.NASB95: And He said, “See to it that you are not misled; for many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am He,’ and, ‘The time is near.’ Do not go after them.
texts.NKJV: And He said: “Take heed that you not be deceived. For many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am He,’ and, ‘The time has drawn near.’ Therefore do not go after them.
texts.DRB: Who said: Take heed you be not seduced; for many will come in my name, saying, I am he; and the time is at hand: go ye not therefore after them.

texts.NIV84: When you hear of wars and revolutions, do not be frightened. These things must happen first, but the end will not come right away."
texts.KJV: But when ye shall hear of wars and commotions, be not terrified: for these things must first come to pass; but the end is not by and by.
texts.NASB95: When you hear of wars and disturbances, do not be terrified; for these things must take place first, but the end does not follow immediately.”
texts.NKJV: But when you hear of wars and commotions, do not be terrified; for these things must come to pass first, but the end will not come immediately.”
texts.DRB: And when you shall hear of wars and seditions, be not terrified: these things must first come to pass; but the end is not yet presently.

texts.NIV84: Then he said to them: "Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.
texts.KJV: Then said he unto them, Nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom:
texts.NASB95: Then He continued by saying to them, “Nation will rise against nation and kingdom against kingdom,
texts.NKJV: Then He said to them, “Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.
texts.DRB: Then he said to them: Nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.

texts.NIV84: There will be great earthquakes, famines and pestilences in various places, and fearful events and great signs from heaven.
texts.KJV: And great earthquakes shall be in divers places, and famines, and pestilences; and fearful sights and great signs shall there be from heaven.
texts.NASB95: and there will be great earthquakes, and in various places plagues and famines; and there will be terrors and great signs from heaven.
texts.NKJV: And there will be great earthquakes in various places, and famines and pestilences; and there will be fearful sights and great signs from heaven.
texts.DRB: And there shall be great earthquakes in divers places, and pestilences, and famines, and terrors from heaven; and there shall be great signs.

texts.NIV84: "But before all this, they will lay hands on you and persecute you. They will deliver you to synagogues and prisons, and you will be brought before kings and governors, and all on account of my name.
texts.KJV: But before all these, they shall lay their hands on you, and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues, and into prisons, being brought before kings and rulers for my name's sake.
texts.NASB95: “But before all these things, they will lay their hands on you and will persecute you, delivering you to the synagogues and prisons, bringing you before kings and governors for My name’s sake.
texts.NKJV: But before all these things, they will lay their hands on you and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues and prisons. You will be brought before kings and rulers for My name’s sake.
texts.DRB: But before all these things, they will lay their hands upon you, and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues and into prisons, dragging you before kings and governors, for my name's sake.

texts.NIV84: This will result in your being witnesses to them.
texts.KJV: And it shall turn to you for a testimony.
texts.NASB95: It will lead to an opportunity for your testimony.
texts.NKJV: But it will turn out for you as an occasion for testimony.
texts.DRB: And it shall happen unto you for a testimony.

texts.NIV84: But make up your mind not to worry beforehand how you will defend yourselves.
texts.KJV: Settle it therefore in your hearts, not to meditate before what ye shall answer:
texts.NASB95: So make up your minds not to prepare beforehand to defend yourselves;
texts.NKJV: Therefore settle it in your hearts not to meditate beforehand on what you will answer;
texts.DRB: Lay it up therefore into your hearts, not to meditate before how you shall answer:

texts.NIV84: For I will give you words and wisdom that none of your adversaries will be able to resist or contradict.
texts.KJV: For I will give you a mouth and wisdom, which all your adversaries shall not be able to gainsay nor resist.
texts.NASB95: for I will give you utterance and wisdom which none of your opponents will be able to resist or refute.
texts.NKJV: for I will give you a mouth and wisdom which all your adversaries will not be able to contradict or resist.
texts.DRB: For I will give you a mouth and wisdom, which all your adversaries shall not be able to resist and gainsay.

texts.NIV84: You will be betrayed even by parents, brothers, relatives and friends, and they will put some of you to death.
texts.KJV: And ye shall be betrayed both by parents, and brethren, and kinsfolks, and friends; and some of you shall they cause to be put to death.
texts.NASB95: But you will be betrayed even by parents and brothers and relatives and friends, and they will put some of you to death,
texts.NKJV: You will be betrayed even by parents and brothers, relatives and friends; and they will put some of you to death.
texts.DRB: And you shall be betrayed by your parents and brethren, and kinsmen and friends; and some of you they will put to death.

texts.NIV84: All men will hate you because of me.
texts.KJV: And ye shall be hated of all men for my name's sake.
texts.NASB95: and you will be hated by all because of My name.
texts.NKJV: And you will be hated by all for My name’s sake.
texts.DRB: And you shall be hated by all men for my name's sake.

texts.NIV84: But not a hair of your head will perish.
texts.KJV: But there shall not an hair of your head perish.
texts.NASB95: Yet not a hair of your head will perish.
texts.NKJV: But not a hair of your head shall be lost.
texts.DRB: But a hair of your head shall not perish.

texts.NIV84: By standing firm you will gain life.
texts.KJV: In your patience possess ye your souls.
texts.NASB95: By your endurance you will gain your lives.
texts.NKJV: By your patience possess your souls.
texts.DRB: In your patience you shall possess your souls.

texts.NIV84: "So when you see standing in the holy place 'the abomination that causes desolation,' spoken of through the prophet Daniel--let the reader understand--
texts.KJV: When ye therefore shall see the abomination of desolation, spoken of by Daniel the prophet, stand in the holy place, (whoso readeth, let him understand:)
texts.NASB95: “Therefore when you see the abomination of desolation which was spoken of through Daniel the prophet, standing in the holy place (let the reader understand),
texts.NKJV: “Therefore when you see the ‘abomination of desolation,’ spoken of by Daniel the prophet, standing in the holy place” (whoever reads, let him understand),
texts.DRB: When therefore you shall see the abomination of desolation, which was spoken of by Daniel the prophet, standing in the holy place: he that readeth let him understand.

texts.NIV84: then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains.
texts.KJV: Then let them which be in Judaea flee into the mountains:
texts.NASB95: then those who are in Judea must flee to the mountains.
texts.NKJV: “then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains.
texts.DRB: Then they that are in Judea, let them flee to the mountains:

texts.NIV84: Let no one on the roof of his house go down to take anything out of the house.
texts.KJV: Let him which is on the housetop not come down to take any thing out of his house:
texts.NASB95: Whoever is on the housetop must not go down to get the things out that are in his house.
texts.NKJV: Let him who is on the housetop not go down to take anything out of his house.
texts.DRB: And he that is on the housetop, let him not come down to take any thing out of his house:

texts.NIV84: Let no one in the field go back to get his cloak.
texts.KJV: Neither let him which is in the field return back to take his clothes.
texts.NASB95: Whoever is in the field must not turn back to get his cloak.
texts.NKJV: And let him who is in the field not go back to get his clothes.
texts.DRB: And he that is in the field, let him not go back to take his coat.

texts.NIV84: How dreadful it will be in those days for pregnant women and nursing mothers!
texts.KJV: And woe unto them that are with child, and to them that give suck in those days!
texts.NASB95: But woe to those who are pregnant and to those who are nursing babies in those days!
texts.NKJV: But woe to those who are pregnant and to those who are nursing babies in those days!
texts.DRB: And woe to them that are with child, and that give suck in those days.

texts.NIV84: Pray that your flight will not take place in winter or on the Sabbath.
texts.KJV: But pray ye that your flight be not in the winter, neither on the sabbath day:
texts.NASB95: But pray that your flight will not be in the winter, or on a Sabbath.
texts.NKJV: And pray that your flight may not be in winter or on the Sabbath.
texts.DRB: But pray that your flight be not in the winter, or on the sabbath.

texts.DRB: For as lightning cometh out of the east, and appeareth even into the west: so shall the coming of the Son of man be.

texts.NKJV: But take heed; see, I have told you all things beforehand.

texts.NKJV: “But when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, then know that its desolation is near.

texts.NKJV: For these are the days of vengeance, that all things which are written may be fulfilled.
texts.DRB: For these are the days of vengeance, that all things may be fulfilled, that are written.

blocks.title: Coming of the Son of Man

texts.NIV84: "Immediately after the distress of those days "'the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light; the stars will fall from the sky, and the heavenly bodies will be shaken.'
texts.KJV: Immediately after the tribulation of those days shall the sun be darkened, and the moon shall not give her light, and the stars shall fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens shall be shaken:
texts.NASB95: “But immediately after the tribulation of those days the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light, and the stars will fall from the sky, and the powers of the heavens will be shaken.
texts.NKJV: “Immediately after the tribulation of those days the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light; the stars will fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens will be shaken.
texts.DRB: And immediately after the tribulation of those days, the sun shall be darkened and the moon shall not give her light, and the stars shall fall from heaven, and the powers of heaven shall be moved:

texts.NIV84: "At that time the sign of the Son of Man will appear in the sky, and all the nations of the earth will mourn. They will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of the sky, with power and great glory.
texts.KJV: And then shall appear the sign of the Son of man in heaven: and then shall all the tribes of the earth mourn, and they shall see the Son of man coming in the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
texts.NASB95: And then the sign of the Son of Man will appear in the sky, and then all the tribes of the earth will mourn, and they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of the sky with power and great glory.
texts.NKJV: Then the sign of the Son of Man will appear in heaven, and then all the tribes of the earth will mourn, and they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
texts.DRB: And then shall appear the sign of the Son of man in heaven: and then shall all tribes of the earth mourn: and they shall see the Son of man coming in the clouds of heaven with much power and majesty.

texts.NIV84: And he will send his angels with a loud trumpet call, and they will gather his elect from the four winds, from one end of the heavens to the other.
texts.KJV: And he shall send his angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they shall gather together his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.
texts.NASB95: And He will send forth His angels with a great trumpet and they will gather together His elect from the four winds, from one end of the sky to the other.
texts.NKJV: And He will send His angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they will gather together His elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.
texts.DRB: And he shall send his angels with a trumpet, and a great voice: and they shall gather together his elect from the four winds, from the farthest parts of the heavens to the utmost bounds of them.

texts.NIV84: "Now learn this lesson from the fig tree: As soon as its twigs get tender and its leaves come out, you know that summer is near.
texts.KJV: Now learn a parable of the fig tree; When his branch is yet tender, and putteth forth leaves, ye know that summer is nigh:
texts.NASB95: “Now learn the parable from the fig tree: when its branch has already become tender and puts forth its leaves, you know that summer is near;
texts.NKJV: “Now learn this parable from the fig tree: When its branch has already become tender and puts forth leaves, you know that summer is near.
texts.DRB: And from the fig tree learn a parable: When the branch thereof is now tender, and the leaves come forth, you know that summer is nigh.
